use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF COMPLICATED INTRA-ABDOMINAL INFECTIONS IN PATIENTS 18 YEARS OF AGE AND OLDER

indications.text:
1.1 Complicated Intra-abdominal Infections 8 USE IN SPECIFIC POPULATIONS
1.2 Usage 8.1 Pregnancy

1.1 Complicated Intra-abdominal Infections
XERAVA is indicated for the treatment of complicated intra-abdominal infections (cIAI) caused
by susceptible microorganisms: Escherichia coli, Klebsiella pneumoniae, Citrobacter freundii,
Enterobacter cloacae, Klebsiella oxytoca, Enterococcus faecalis, Ente...
